fields.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
fields.description: Single-leg strength exercise. Targets quads.
fields.steps: Place rear foot elevated\nLower body\nPush up

fields.name: Hyperextensions
fields.description: Strengthens lower back. Improves posture.

fields.description: Controlled back exercise. Builds strength.

fields.name: One Arm Dumbbell Row
fields.description: Targets mid back. Improves balance.

fields.description: Strengthens upper back. Improves stability.

fields.name: Seated Cable Row
fields.description: Targets mid back. Improves posture.

fields.name: Machine T-Bar Row
fields.description: Targets upper back. Builds strength.

fields.name: Barbell Row
fields.description: Builds back thickness. Engages multiple muscles.

fields.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
fields.description: Improves unilateral strength. Targets lats.

fields.name: Close-Grip Pulldown
fields.description: Focuses inner lats. Improves thickness.

fields.name: Lat Pulldown
fields.description: Alternative to pull-ups. Builds lat width.

fields.name: Pull-Ups
fields.description: Targets lats. Builds upper body strength.
fields.steps: Pull body up\nChin above bar\nLower slowly

fields.name: Cable Seated Chest Press
fields.description: Controlled chest press. Good for isolation.

fields.name: High to Low Cable Fly
fields.description: Targets lower chest. Improves definition.

fields.name: Decline Bench Press
fields.description: Focuses on lower chest. Builds mass.

fields.name: Chest Dips
fields.description: Targets lower chest. Builds strength.

fields.name: Machine Chest Press
fields.description: Controlled chest movement. Good for beginners.

fields.name: Pushups
fields.description: Bodyweight chest exercise. Improves endurance.

fields.name: Flat Dumbbell Press
fields.description: Improves chest symmetry. Allows full range.

fields.name: Flat Barbell Bench Press
fields.description: Classic chest builder. Builds strength and size.

fields.name: Low to High Cable Fly
fields.description: Isolates upper chest. Improves definition.

fields.name: Incline Barbell Press
fields.description: Develops upper chest. Improves pressing strength.

fields.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
fields.description: Targets upper chest. Builds mass and strength.

fields.name: Bent Over Lateral Raise
fields.description: Targets rear delts. Enhances shoulder balance.

fields.name: Face Pulls
fields.description: Strengthens rear delts and traps. Improves shoulder health.

fields.name: Reverse Pec Deck
fields.description: Isolates rear delts. Improves posture.
fields.steps: Pull handles back\nSqueeze shoulder blades\nReturn slowly

fields.name: Upright Row
fields.description: Targets traps and side delts. Builds upper body strength.
fields.steps: Pull bar upward\nKeep elbows high\nLower slowly

fields.name: Cable Lateral Raise (Leaning)
fields.description: Maintains tension throughout movement. Improves isolation.

fields.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
fields.description: Targets side delts. Builds shoulder width.

fields.name: Machine Shoulder Press
fields.description: Controlled shoulder press. Good for beginners.

fields.name: Front Raise
fields.description: Isolates front delts. Enhances shoulder definition.

fields.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
fields.description: Improves shoulder stability. Builds strength evenly.
fields.steps: Press dumbbells up\nLower controlled\nKeep core tight

fields.name: Barbell Overhead Press
fields.description: Builds shoulder strength. Targets front delts.

fields.name: Reverse Grip Bench Press
fields.description: Focuses on triceps. Reduces chest involvement.
fields.steps: Grip bar reverse\nLower to chest\nPress up

fields.name: Diamond Pushups
fields.description: Bodyweight triceps builder. Engages chest and core.

fields.name: Reverse Grip Cable Pushdowns
fields.description: Targets medial head of triceps. Improves arm detail.

fields.name: JM Press
fields.description: Hybrid press for triceps. Combines bench press and skull crusher.
fields.steps: Lower bar toward chest\nPress up\nKeep elbows tight

fields.name: Cable Rope Pushdowns
fields.description: Targets lateral head of triceps. Great for definition.
fields.steps: Push rope down\nSpread at bottom\nReturn slowly

fields.name: Dips (Weighted)
fields.description: Compound triceps movement. Adds strength and size.
fields.steps: Lower body down\nPush up\nKeep torso upright

fields.name: Skull Crushers
fields.description: Effective triceps isolation movement. Builds strength and mass.
fields.steps: Lower bar to forehead\nExtend arms\nKeep elbows fixed

fields.name: Overhead Dumbbell Extension
fields.description: Targets triceps long head. Builds arm size.
fields.steps: Hold dumbbell overhead\nLower behind head\nExtend up

fields.name: Dumbbell Curls
fields.description: Classic biceps builder. Helps develop size and strength.
fields.steps: Curl both arms\nSqueeze at top\nLower slowly

fields.name: Rope Hammer Curls
fields.description: Works brachialis with cable tension. Maintains constant resistance.

fields.name: Cross Body Hammer Curls
fields.description: Variation focusing on brachialis. Improves arm density.
fields.steps: Curl across body\nSqueeze at top\nLower slowly

fields.name: Hammer Curls
fields.description: Targets brachialis and forearms. Adds arm thickness.

fields.name: Concentration Curl
fields.description: Highly focused curl for peak biceps contraction. Great for mind-muscle connection.
fields.steps: Sit and rest elbow on thigh\nCurl dumbbell\nLower slowly

fields.name: Preacher Curls
fields.description: Strict isolation exercise reducing momentum. Excellent for peak contraction.
fields.steps: Place arms on pad\nCurl up\nLower fully

fields.name: Wide Grip Barbell Curl
fields.description: Targets inner biceps for fuller look. Improves arm width.
fields.steps: Grip wider than shoulders\nCurl bar up\nLower with control

fields.name: Narrow Grip Barbell Curl
fields.description: Emphasizes the outer biceps head. Builds thickness and definition.
fields.steps: Grip bar narrow\nCurl up slowly\nControl the descent

fields.name: Drag Curl
fields.description: Focuses on biceps with minimal shoulder involvement. Great for strict form and isolation.
fields.steps: Keep bar close to body\nPull elbows back\nCurl upward

fields.name: Incline Dumbbell Curls
fields.description: Targets the long head of the biceps for peak development. Helps improve arm symmetry and strength.
fields.steps: Sit on incline bench\nCurl dumbbells upward\nLower slowly

fields.name: Barbell Wrist Curls
fields.description: Isolates forearm flexors. Builds wrist strength and size.
fields.steps: Hold bar underhand\nCurl wrists upward\nLower slowly

fields.name: Behind-the-Back Wrist Curl
fields.description: Targets lower forearm flexors. Improves wrist strength.
fields.steps: Hold bar behind back\nCurl wrists upward\nLower slowly

fields.name: Plate Pinches
fields.description: Improves grip strength and forearm endurance. Engages flexor muscles.
fields.steps: Hold plates together\nLift and hold\nMaintain grip

fields.name: Barbell reverse wrist curls
fields.description: Isolates forearm extensors. Builds strength and endurance.
fields.steps: Hold bar overhand\nCurl wrists upward\nLower slowly

fields.name: Wrist Rollers
fields.description: Strengthens forearm extensors and grip endurance. Great for overall forearm development.

fields.name: Reverse Grip Cable Curls
fields.description: Targets forearm extensors with constant tension. Improves muscle control.
fields.steps: Use straight bar\nCurl upward with reverse grip\nReturn slowly

fields.name: Reverse Barbell Curls
fields.description: Targets upper forearms and improves grip. Builds forearm strength.
fields.steps: Hold bar with overhand grip\nCurl upward\nLower slowly

fields.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curls
fields.description: Builds brachioradialis and forearm size. Improves grip strength.

fields.name: Preacher Hammer Curls
fields.description: Targets brachioradialis and upper forearms. Helps build forearm thickness and strength.
fields.steps: Sit on preacher bench\nHold dumbbells neutral\nCurl upward and lower slowly

fields.name: Grilled Chicken Protein Bowl
fields.ingredients: 120g chicken breast; 1 cup broccoli; 1/2 cup bell peppers; 1 tsp olive oil; salt, pepper, paprika
fields.method: Season chicken. Cook 5-6 min each side. Steam veggies. Slice and serve.
fields.tips: Use a non-stick pan to reduce oil usage; Don’t overcook chicken to keep it juicy; Add lemon juice for extra flavor without calories

fields.name: Egg White Veg Omelette
fields.ingredients: 5 egg whites; onion; tomato; spinach; salt; pepper
fields.method: Whisk egg whites. Add veggies. Cook on low flame. Fold and serve.
fields.tips: Cook on low heat for a soft texture; Add 1 whole egg for better taste if needed; Avoid butter or excess oil

fields.name: Whey Protein Smoothie
fields.ingredients: 1 scoop whey; almond milk; 1/2 banana; ice
fields.tips: Skip banana for lower calories; Use cold milk for better taste; Best consumed right after workout

fields.name: Low-Fat Paneer Bhurji
fields.method: Saute onion. Add tomato + spices. Add paneer. Cook 3-4 mins.
fields.tips: Use low-fat paneer to reduce calories; Do not overcook paneer; Add capsicum for extra nutrients

fields.name: Chicken Lettuce Wraps
fields.ingredients: 100g minced chicken; lettuce; garlic; soy sauce
fields.method: Cook chicken. Fill lettuce and wrap.
fields.tips: Avoid heavy sauces to keep calories low; Eat fresh for best texture; Add chilli flakes for extra flavor

fields.name: Greek Yogurt Protein Bowl
fields.tips: Avoid flavored yogurt (high sugar); Add cinnamon for flavor; Great for cravings

fields.name: Moong Dal Chilla
fields.tips: Use non-stick pan; Add veggies; Keep batter medium thick

fields.name: Protein Oats
fields.method: Cook oats. Cool slightly. Add protein.
fields.tips: Do not cook protein powder directly; Add cocoa or cinnamon for taste; Adjust thickness with water

fields.name: Chickpea Salad
fields.ingredients: 1 cup chickpeas; onion; tomato; cucumber; lemon
fields.method: Mix all ingredients. Chill and serve.
fields.tips: Add chaat masala for flavor; Use fresh veggies; Avoid excess salt

fields.name: Boiled Egg & Veg Bowl
fields.method: Chop eggs. Mix with veggies. Serve.
fields.tips: Remove one yolk for fewer calories; Add lemon juice; Keep it simple

fields.name: Chicken Lettuce Wrap
fields.tips: Avoid heavy sauces; Eat fresh; Add chilli flakes

fields.name: Peanut Butter Protein Shake
fields.tips: Use small peanut butter amount; No sugar needed; Best post workout

fields.name: Grilled Paneer Salad
fields.tips: Use low-fat paneer; Add herbs; Avoid excess oil

fields.name: Lentil Soup
fields.tips: Avoid heavy tadka; Keep it light; Add lemon for taste

fields.name: Scrambled Tofu
fields.tips: Great egg substitute; Add veggies; Use minimal oil

fields.name: Air Fried Chicken
fields.tips: No oil needed; Do not overcook; Use spices well

fields.name: Sprouts Salad
fields.tips: Steam sprouts if needed; Add salt lightly; Eat fresh

fields.name: Protein Mug Cake
fields.tips: Use stevia; Do not overcook; Adjust consistency

fields.name: Egg Bhurji (Low Oil)
fields.tips: Use minimal oil; Cook medium heat; Add spices lightly

fields.name: Coffee Protein Shake
fields.tips: No sugar needed; Use cold coffee; Great energy boost

fields.name: Chicken Soup
fields.tips: Keep it clear; Avoid cream; Add herbs

fields.name: Cucumber Tuna Salad
fields.tips: Avoid mayo; Add pepper; Eat fresh

fields.name: Cottage Cheese Bowl
fields.tips: Add herbs; Use low-fat cheese; Simple and filling

fields.name: Egg Drop Soup
fields.tips: Quick recipe; Keep it light; No heavy sauces

fields.name: Besan Chilla
fields.tips: Add spinach; Use little oil; Keep batter smooth

fields.name: Chicken Stir Fry
fields.tips: Use less oil; Add soy lightly; Cook high heat

fields.name: Almond Protein Shake
fields.tips: Use unsweetened milk; Add ice; No sugar needed
